panels.description: Ratio of 5xx HTTP responses to all calls.

targets.expr:
sum by (service) (increase(traefik_service_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", service=~"$service", code=~"5.+"}[$__interval] offset -$__interval))/
sum by (service) (increase(traefik_service_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", service=~"$service"}[$__interval] offset -$__interval)>0)*100

panels.title: Server errors rate

panels.description: Ratio of 4xx HTTP responses to all calls.

targets.expr:
sum by (service) (increase(traefik_service_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", service=~"$service", code=~"4.+"}[$__interval] offset -$__interval))/
sum by (service) (increase(traefik_service_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", service=~"$service"}[$__interval] offset -$__interval)>0)*100

panels.title: Client errors rate

panels.description: Load distribution by method, code over $__interval

targets.expr: sum by (method) (increase(traefik_service_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", service=~"$service", code!=""}[$__interval] offset -$__interval)) > 0

panels.title: Load by method/$__interval

panels.description: Load distribution by method, code over $__interval

targets.expr:
sum by (alias) (
label_replace(
(increase(traefik_service_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", service=~"$service", code!=""}[$__interval] offset -$__interval )) > 0,
  "alias", "HTTP ${1}00-${1}99", "code", "(.).+"
))

panels.title: Load by HTTP codes/$__interval

targets.expr: sum by (protocol, entrypoint) (increase(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", entrypoint=~"$entrypoint"}[$__interval] offset -$__interval)) > 0
